  "weights": {

    "R1.5": 0.3,

    "R1.7": 0.3,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0

  "active_set": [
    "R1.2",
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "The request 'Help me with this section' is broad. Should I prioritize (A) a surface-level review of writing, grammar, and flow, or (B) a deeper scientific review of the methodology's logical consistency and potential ambiguities?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The delegation could imply a check on whether the described bioinformatics pipeline is methodologically sound and its steps are logically connected.",
    "R1.6": "A common interpretation of 'help me with this' is to request improvements to sentence-level clarity, grammar, and style.",
    "RX.1": "I will disclose any unstated assumptions or potential ambiguities in the described methodology.",
    "RX.2": "I will check that the description of the methods does not overstate its capabilities, for instance regarding reproducibility.",
    "RX.3": "My feedback will be strictly confined to the provided artifact, which is a single methods section.",
    "RX.4": "I will consider whether the described methods or their potential application could lead to misinterpretation or other downstream harms.",
    "RX.5": "My suggestions will be traceable to specific parts of the original text to ensure clear provenance."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: The request 'Help me with this section' is broad. Should I prioritize (A) a surface-level review of writing, grammar, and flow, or (B) a deeper scientific review of the methodology's logical consistency and potential ambiguities?

rationale.R1.2: The delegation could imply a check on whether the described bioinformatics pipeline is methodologically sound and its steps are logically connected.
rationale.R1.6: A common interpretation of 'help me with this' is to request improvements to sentence-level clarity, grammar, and style.
rationale.RX.1: I will disclose any unstated assumptions or potential ambiguities in the described methodology.
rationale.RX.2: I will check that the description of the methods does not overstate its capabilities, for instance regarding reproducibility.
rationale.RX.3: My feedback will be strictly confined to the provided artifact, which is a single methods section.
rationale.RX.4: I will consider whether the described methods or their potential application could lead to misinterpretation or other downstream harms.
rationale.RX.5: My suggestions will be traceable to specific parts of the original text to ensure clear provenance.
